title: Region
description: Defines a geographic or regulatory region with hierarchical support.

RegionCode.description: Geographic region code. Accepts GLOBAL (worldwide), MULTIPLE (multi-jurisdiction), 2-3 character ISO country codes (US, CA, UK, SGP), regional groupings (APAC, LATAM, AFRICA, AMERICAS, MENA, OCEANIA, EU), and sub-regions with hyphen (US-CA for California, DE-BY for Bavaria, CA-QC for Quebec).

code.description: Unique region code. GLOBAL, regional groupings (APAC, LATAM, AMERICAS, EU), ISO country codes (US, CA), or sub-regions (US-CA, DE-BY).

parent_code.description: Parent region code. null for top-level, or a valid region code (GLOBAL, APAC, AMERICAS, EU, US, etc.).

level.description: Hierarchy tier classification: global (worldwide), region (continental groupings like APAC, EU), country (nation-states), subdivision (states, provinces, territories).

tier.description: Numeric hierarchy tier for efficient comparison. 0=global, 1=region, 2=country, 3=subdivision. Lower tier = broader scope.

default_inheritance.description: Whether rules at this region level inherit to child regions. When true (default), a rule targeting 'US' also applies to 'US-CA'.

flag_emoji.description: Optional flag emoji for UI display.

display_order.description: Sort order for UI display (lower = earlier).
